description_long: This object is a pale, conical mushroom with a robust, slightly tapered stem and a cap that displays pronounced radial ridges and folds. The cap's surface is wrinkled and textured, with a somewhat uneven margin that appears slightly wavy. The coloration is predominantly off-white to light beige, with subtle brownish streaks and some darker lines running along the length of the stem. The underside of the cap reveals deep, radiating gill-like structures, giving it a distinctly ribbed appearance. There is a visible label with numbers on one side, suggesting it may be part of a collection or study. The overall form is solid and compact, with no visible openings or receptacle features.
description: A pale, conical mushroom with a wrinkled, ribbed cap and a sturdy, tapered stem. The surface is textured and off-white with subtle brown streaks.
description_view_0: This view shows the side of the mushroom with a visible label, highlighting the conical shape and the smooth, slightly streaked surface of the stem.
description_view_1: The mushroom is seen from the side, displaying the full length of the stem and the cap's gentle taper, with subtle surface lines and a solid appearance.
description_view_2: This angle reveals the underside of the cap, showcasing the deep, radiating ridges and folds that resemble gills.
description_view_3: A direct view of the cap's underside, emphasizing the pronounced, radial gill-like structures and the wavy margin of the cap.
